steps.title: Find the signal
steps.content: The colon reveals that scholars have drawn connections linking modern Hawaiian writers to traditional Kanaka Maoli stories—this indicates a thematic thread bridging past and present.

steps.title: Match the concept
steps.content:
Continuity means an unbroken thematic thread, which is exactly what linking modern works to traditional sources demonstrates.

Subtlety and sophistication describe stylistic qualities unrelated to this thematic connection, while innovation emphasizes newness rather than linkage to tradition.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
